subtitle: A mile-long crescent of coconut palms and seasonal coco-huts in South Goa, where a court-ordered 10pm silence taught the whole beach to dance in headphones.
spike_statement: A 1.6 km palm-fringed crescent where an enforced 10pm music ban produced India's original silent disco — clubbers dancing in wireless headphones on the sand.

levers.photo_tone: coconut-palm-green over pale gold sand, calm Arabian Sea, wooden coco-huts and bare-bulb shacks at dusk
